message:
feat(command,runtime,store,conformance): add COMMAND DOCS, fix ZADD XX and CLIENT LIST pubsub counts

COMMAND DOCS (fr-command):
- Implement full COMMAND DOCS subcommand with command group detection,
  summary generation, and argument documentation
- Add inline tests for CLIENT PAUSE/UNPAUSE validation

CLIENT LIST (fr-runtime):
- Report live pubsub subscription counts (channels, patterns, shard
  channels) in CLIENT LIST output
- Update CLIENT TRACKING/CACHING to fail-closed with explicit errors

ZADD XX (fr-store):
- Fix ZADD XX on missing keys to not create empty sorted sets
- Add dirty counter tracking for sorted set removals
- Add zadd_xx_test.rs, pfadd_empty.rs, zadd_bug.rs integration tests

Conformance (fr-conformance):
- Fix quarantine candidate handling to always write (not conditional)
- Fix newline padding for empty lists
- Use actual HOME for rch executable path resolution
- Add type-safe exit code casting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
